case_title: REGINALDO SOUZA FERREIRA VS. CAROLINA DERICO BAMDAD

docket_entries.description: REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FERREIRA, REGINALDO SOUZA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY FERREIRA, REGINALDO SOUZA AS TO DEFENDANT BAMDAD, CAROLINA DERICO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-05-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF REGINALDO SOUZA FERREIRA. NO APPEARANCES BY CAROLINA DERICO BAMDAD. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS).
